improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Your professional AI assistant for trade and business operations. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI">
improvements.rationale: Search engines and social platforms use meta descriptions and OG tags to generate preview snippets. A clear, benefit-driven description improves click-through rates from Google results and makes social shares look professional. Including the free trial offer and starting price creates urgency without overpromising. Character counts are optimized for display limits.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Partner"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice-powered support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces Gideon by name, establishing brand identity while clearly communicating the AI-powered value proposition. The subheading highlights three core benefits (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) that differentiate the product, then removes friction with a clear free trial CTA and no-commitment reassurance. The copy is concise, benefit-driven, and builds trust without making unverifiable claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business assistance, voice chat, and your own members workspace. Choose annual billing and save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most likely friction point for new visitors—understanding the paywall transition. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and key benefits, it reduces uncertainty and encourages conversion at the decision moment.
